description.value:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Battle Focus]

Each time you reduce a hostile creature to 0 Hit Points in the next minute, you regain @Damage[@actor.level[healing]] Hit Points equal to your level. If you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Wounded], you can reduce the wounded condition by 1 instead of regaining Hit Points.
